Hey, what's going on everyone? Welcome to the Lead Nurture portion. So let's rock and roll. Lead Nurture is everything that happens between the opt-in and the show-up. So everything from the time we get the name from the advertisement to actually getting that person to walk through the door and or if we're doing those situations, but the nurture process is what that arrow represents. So there's three things that we try to accomplish in this piece of the process. First is to get them to schedule. Some of this is already accomplished with the online scheduler. So that takes a lot of the work out, believe it or not, in the beginning for the first four years I did this. I didn't have my line schedule. So we had to manually reach out to everyone to get them to schedule. But that was obviously the first objective. And so the subject of underneath that would be to get them to pick up first and then get them to pick a time. And that's for somebody who opted in and then did not schedule on the thank you page or get them to pick up and confirm the time unless they confirm the time and they have built a little bit of rapport and they have a desire to show up. Otherwise, it's somebody who clicked twice with their thumb while they were on the toilet and has very low likelihood of actually appearing. So you need to treat leads that have scheduled leads that have not scheduled the same. Whereas with the people who have scheduled, you're just confirming that time and getting them excited about showing up. Okay, so for this process, I'll be going over the calling and texting sequence, the phone script and the text scripts that we use throughout the process. The second objective is to get them to show. So once we have them scheduled, we have them with a time that's confirmed, we want to increase the likelihood of this show up. And so we'll sort of milked the skim the cream off the top. So to say, the last thing we do in a last push style campaign, so we basically blast the list one more time. And I do this on a periodic basis, usually be like 14 days or so. And if you want, I'll show you the sequence says, but it's essentially just like a scarcity play push always pays for itself. We always get sales from that. So I highly, highly, highly recommend you do it. So that is the leaner to overview.
